calendar.matters:
MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-26-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance, nor objection filed. Order to Show Cause to Self-represented Plaintiff for failure to complete Judicial Arbitration is heard this day. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (212)

CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Commpelling Tariq Mirza, M.D. To Attend And Answer Questions At Deposition And Produce For Inspection Documents Described In The Deposition Notice And For Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Tariq Mirza, M.D. And Jehan N. Jayakumar, Esq.
Off Calendar Sep-21-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Daniel S. Sharp, Esq. of KNOX RICKSEN (510-285-2500), appearing for defendant/
moving party Leroy Bermudez
Jehan N. Jayakumar, Esq. of CARLSON & JAYAKUMAR (949-222-2008), appearing for Tariz Mirza

RULING:

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Defendant Leroy Bermudez's Motion For Order Compelling Tariz Mirza, M.D. To Attend And Answer Questions At Deposition And Produce For Inspection Documents Described In The Deposition Notice is granted in part and denied in part.

The motion is denied as it seeks what is described in the motion as documents regarding the corporate structure of the medical corporation as there is no separate statement which sets forth the documents sought and the basis for requiring their production.

The motion is granted as to deposition questions 1 and 2. The motion is denied as to deposition questions 2-8 as they are irrelevant.

The remainder of the deposition shall proceed by written questions.

All requests for sanctions are denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
